prompt: Let the AI freely imagine the appearance and atmosphere of the attached photo and generate a realistic 'shot of a lifetime' that looks like it was naturally taken by a friend with an iPhone during an overseas trip. I want it to have a trendy Korean feel, with an urban and creator mood. An atmosphere that feels like a genuinely attractive person rather than an exaggerated model. Let the AI directly select a destination that best suits my vibe, and make the landmark of that city naturally visible in the background. Based on the attached photo, focus on a full-body shot, basic iPhone camera feel, natural light, slight camera shake, and a realistic composition to make it look like a 'real photo taken while traveling'. The fashion should be a minimal and trendy style. Prohibit excessive luxury looks. Generate a natural result that looks like an actual travel photo when posted on social media, without an excessive AI feel. Design it with a professional travel magazine layout. Add handwritten doodles of the travel location. Sharp focus. 4k high quality.
